title: Build an app from your phone in AI Studio
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build a custom image-generation app directly from a mobile browser using Google AI Studio, voice commands, and the Nano Banana API without installing software. The tutorial shows how Gemini reasons through instructions to generate code in real time.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building a custom image-generation app entirely from a mobile browser using Google AI Studio, with no software installation required. The build relies on voice commands and the Nano Banana API, and Gemini reasons through the spoken instructions to generate code in real time. The takeaway: a working app can be assembled from a phone, with code produced on the fly as instructions are issued.
